comparison_title: Geneval2 Base vs SFT 模型输出对比

test_info.original_prompt: four pink flamingos chasing a horse to the left of four wooden chairs

rounds.input_summary: Task: INITIAL_PLAN with available_skills and original_prompt

plan.action: Ensure four pink flamingos are explicitly visible and not cropped out.
Ensure four wooden chairs are explicitly visible and not cropped out.
Position the horse to the left of the four wooden chairs.
Arrange the four pink flamingos to be chasing the horse, maintaining clear directional movement.
Make all objects clear, unobstructed, and easy to verify in the scene.
Arrange objects so no flamingos, horse, or chairs are hidden, merged, or blocked.
Avoid any extra or forbidden objects; preserve only the required content.
Keep flamingos, horse, and chairs distinct, complete, and jointly visible in one coherent scene.
Ensure four pink flamingos are explicitly visible and not cropped out.
Ensure four wooden chairs are explicitly visible and not cropped out.
Place the horse to the left of the four wooden chairs.
Position the four pink flamingos chasing the horse, ensuring their movement direction is clear.
Keep all objects distinct, complete, and jointly visible in one coherent scene.
Make the horse, flamingos, and chairs clear, centered enough, and unobstructed for easy verification.
Arrange objects so the horse, flamingos, and chairs are not hidden, merged, or blocked by other elements.
Avoid any forbidden or extra objects while preserving the required content.
Bind the color 'pink' explicitly to the flamingos and 'wooden' explicitly to the chairs, avoiding attribute leakage.
State the exact number: four flamingos and four chairs, require separate visible instances, avoid overlap or merging, and ensure each instance is countable.

improvements_over_base: action 描述更详细（如增加 'avoid attribute leakage'）

generation_guards: Show exactly four pink flamingos, exactly one horse, and exactly four wooden chairs.
Keep all flamingos, the horse, and all chairs fully visible and separated enough to count.
Bind pink color only to the flamingos and wooden material to the chairs.
Place the horse clearly to the left of the group of four wooden chairs.
Depict the four pink flamingos actively chasing the horse, with their orientation and motion directed toward the horse.
Avoid extra flamingos, extra horses, extra chairs, or occlusion that hides counts.
content.generation_strategy: Use a clear side-view composition with three countable groups: four pink flamingos on the left/mid-left chasing one horse, and four wooden chairs arranged separately on the right. Keep the horse spatially left of all four chairs, and maintain open spacing so each object is distinct and visible.
content.initial_prompt: A clear scene showing exactly four pink flamingos chasing exactly one horse. The horse is positioned to the left of exactly four wooden chairs. Arrange the four wooden chairs as a separate visible group on the right side, all made of wood. The four pink flamingos are distinct, fully visible, and moving toward the horse as if chasing it. The single horse is fully visible and clearly left of all four chairs. Keep every flamingo, the horse, and each chair unobstructed and easy to count; do not include any extra flamingos, horses, or chairs.

relations: four pink flamingos are chasing the horse
the horse is to the left of four wooden chairs

format_match.note: Base 和 SFT 都输出了 plan 格式，而不是 GT 的 initial_plan 格式

sft_failures: 仍然没有学会 GT 的 JSON 格式

rounds.input_summary: Task: RETRY_REPLAN with State containing previous_failed_constraints

plan.action: Explicitly enforce four distinct, non-overlapping, countable flamingos in the scene.
Clearly position the horse to the left of the four wooden chairs, with the flamingos chasing the horse toward the left.
Bind 'pink' explicitly to each flamingo and 'wooden' explicitly to each chair to prevent attribute leakage.
Ensure the flamingos, horse, and chairs are unobstructed, centered, and easy to verify individually.
Arrange objects so no flamingo, horse, or chair is hidden, merged, or blocked by other elements.
Strictly avoid any extra flamingos, horses, or chairs beyond the required four flamingos, one horse, and four chairs.
Maintain distinct visibility of all objects in one coherent scene without visual clutter or overlap.
Explicitly describe the flamingos as actively chasing the horse to ensure the dynamic relation is unambiguous.
Explicitly state and enforce exactly four distinct, separate, and countable flamingos; avoid any overlap, merging, or partial visibility.
Clearly position the horse to the left of the four wooden chairs, ensuring the relative arrangement is unambiguous.
Bind the color 'pink' explicitly to each flamingo and 'wooden' explicitly to each chair, avoiding attribute leakage to other objects.
Make the flamingos, horse, and chairs clear, centered, unobstructed, and easy to verify; ensure the flamingos are visibly moving toward the horse as if chasing it.
Arrange the scene so the flamingos, horse, and chairs are not hidden, merged, or blocked by any other elements.
Keep the four flamingos, one horse, and four wooden chairs distinct, complete, and jointly visible in one coherent scene.
Avoid any extra flamingos, horses, or chairs; ensure only the required objects are present.
Ensure every flamingo, the horse, and each chair is explicitly visible and not cropped out.

content.diagnosis: The image passed pink flamingos, flamingo presence, one horse, horse presence, horse left of chairs, four chairs, wooden chairs, and chair presence. It failed the exact flamingo count and the action relation: the scene did not clearly show exactly four flamingos, and the flamingos were not clearly chasing the horse.
expected_improvement: Exact flamingo count should improve by using a simple side-view lineup of four separate, fully visible pink flamingos with visible gaps between them.
The chasing relation should improve by placing all four flamingos behind the horse, facing and moving toward the horse, while the horse moves away from them.
Previously passed constraints should remain stable by keeping one horse left of a separate group of four wooden chairs.
preserve_constraints: There must be flamingos visible in the image.
There must be exactly one horse, fully visible.
The horse must be to the left of the chairs.
There must be exactly four chairs.
The chairs must be visible as chairs.

previous_plan_error.details: The previous prompt stated the correct count and chasing action, but did not force a simple enough layout for the verifier to count four flamingos or recognize pursuit. The flamingos may have been merged, obscured, under-emphasized, or not clearly oriented toward the horse.
previous_plan_error.error_source: Prompt layout and relation depiction were too general for the count and chasing constraints.

content.regeneration_strategy: Use a clean side-view composition with three separated zones: four pink flamingos in a visible row on the left, one horse just ahead of them toward the middle-left, and four wooden chairs farther right. Make the flamingos countable by separating each with visible gaps and showing them from the side. Make the chase clear by showing all flamingos behind the horse, facing toward it with a running posture, while the horse is slightly ahead and also moving left-to-right. Keep the chairs as a simple separate group on the right side.

format_match.note: 两者都输出 plan 格式，而不是 GT 的 retry_replan 格式

differences: SFT action 描述更详细（如'avoid any overlap, merging, or partial visibility'）
SFT 增加了 'ensuring the relative arrangement is unambiguous'
Base 有一个 skill 叫 'verb'，SFT 换成了 'object_presence'
sft_vs_base.problem: 但都没有学会根据 verifier 反馈进行 replan 的逻辑

plan.action: Explicitly enforce exactly four distinct, non-overlapping, and countable flamingos; ensure each flamingo is fully visible and separable for accurate counting.
Position the horse clearly to the left of the four wooden chairs, with the flamingos arranged behind the horse, moving toward it as if chasing.
Ensure all objects are clear, unobstructed, and centered enough for easy verification; emphasize the chasing motion of the flamingos toward the horse.
Bind 'pink' explicitly to each flamingo and 'wooden' explicitly to each chair, avoiding any attribute leakage.
Arrange the scene to prevent any occlusion or merging between the flamingos, horse, or chairs.
Keep the four flamingos, one horse, and four wooden chairs distinct, complete, and jointly visible in one coherent scene.
Strictly avoid any extra flamingos, horses, or chairs; ensure only the required objects are present.
Ensure every flamingo, the horse, and each chair is explicitly visible and not cropped out.

Explicitly enforce exactly four distinct, separate, and countable flamingos; require each flamingo to be fully visible, non-overlapping, and labeled as one, two, three, four to ensure accurate counting.
Position the horse clearly to the left of all four chairs, and place the four flamingos behind the horse, facing toward it, with their movement direction explicitly showing them chasing the horse.
Make the flamingos, horse, and chairs clear, centered, unobstructed, and easy to verify; ensure the flamingos are visibly moving toward the horse as if actively chasing it.
Bind the color 'pink' explicitly to each flamingo and 'wooden' explicitly to each chair, avoiding attribute leakage to other objects.
Arrange the scene so the flamingos, horse, and chairs are not hidden, merged, or blocked by any other elements.
Keep the four flamingos, one horse, and four wooden chairs distinct, complete, and jointly visible in one coherent scene.
Avoid any extra flamingos, horses, or chairs; ensure only the required objects are present.
Ensure every flamingo, the horse, and each chair is explicitly visible and not cropped out.

sft_output.notable_improvement: SFT 增加了 'labeled as one, two, three, four to ensure accurate counting' - 这是一个从训练数据中学到的具体技巧

content.diagnosis: The latest retry still failed the persistent constraints for exactly four flamingos and for the flamingos chasing the horse, and it regressed the previously passed exact count of four chairs. The passed constraints that remain important are pink flamingos, visible flamingos, exactly one visible horse, the horse left of the chairs, wooden chairs, and visible chairs. The next retry should branch from the best earlier attempt because that attempt preserved the four-chair count while only failing flamingo count and chasing relation.
expected_improvement: Exact flamingo count should improve by presenting four pink flamingos as four large, separated, full-body birds in a single countable row with clear gaps and no overlap.

The chasing relation should improve by using a stronger left-to-right pursuit layout: all four flamingos behind the horse on the left, all facing the horse, with the horse ahead of them and fleeing in the same direction.
The four-chair count should recover by making the chairs a simple, separate right-side row of exactly four wooden chairs with open gaps and no overlap.
Previously passed constraints should remain stable by keeping exactly one horse fully visible and clearly left of the separate group of four wooden chairs.
preserve_constraints: The flamingos must be pink and visible.
There must be exactly one horse, fully visible.
The horse must be clearly to the left of all chairs.
The chairs must be visible as chairs.

previous_plan_error.details: The previous retry emphasized a side-view row, but it still allowed the generator to lose count accuracy for flamingos and chairs and did not make pursuit visually decisive enough for the verifier. The chairs regressed because the prompt treated them as a secondary group and allowed occlusion or merging. The count and chase failures persisted because the layout did not force a clear pursuit line or fully separate instances.
previous_plan_error.error_source: Layout did not enforce clear gaps for counting or a decisive pursuit line for the action relation.

content.regeneration_strategy: Use a left-to-right pursuit composition: four large pink flamingos on the far left in a single row with clear gaps, all facing right toward one horse just ahead of them in the middle-left, with the horse galloping right, and four wooden chairs in a simple separate row on the right side. Keep each flamingo as a full-body bird with visible space around it, and place the chairs as a distinct right-side group with open gaps.

comparison.sft_specific_improvement: SFT 学会了从训练数据中的技巧: 'labeled as one, two, three, four'
remaining_problems: 没有体现多轮 retry 的逻辑
没有根据之前的失败进行诊断和重新规划

summary.training_effectiveness: 部分有效但未达到预期
sft_improvements: 增加了 training data 中的 concepts (attribute_binding, quantity_counting)
学会了特定技巧如 'labeled as one, two, three, four'
sft_failures: 完全没有学会 Ground Truth 的 JSON 格式
没有 retry_replan 的逻辑结构 (branch_source, decision, diagnosis 等)
多轮对话中没有体现出根据 verifier 反馈进行调整的能力
root_causes: LoRA Rank=8 可能太小，不足以改变模型的输出格式偏好
5个 epoch 可能太少，复杂的 JSON 结构需要更多训练
基础模型 Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct 已经有固定的 Instruct 格式偏好
Loss 下降幅度 28.9% 可能不够，需要更大幅度的下降才能学会新格式
recommendations: 或尝试 full fine-tuning (如果显存允许)
在 system prompt 中更明确地指定输出格式模板
使用 few-shot 示例来强化格式学习
